name: arxiv-research
description: Search and retrieve papers from arXiv.

interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools for searching arXiv and retrieving paper metadata, abstracts, and PDF links through the official arXiv API.
defaultPrompt: Search arXiv for recent papers on diffusion models.
Fetch arXiv:1706.03762 and summarize the abstract.
Find recent cs.CL papers about retrieval augmented generation.
